content.en:
Collecting Star Sand requires a star-type Great Divine Power or Chaos Divine Power, and Ye Tian happens to have this kind of Star Chaos Divine Power.

He had previously cultivated a Chaos Divine Power, called the Starlight Extermination Hand, which was a star-type Chaos Divine Power, and his ranking was not low, at 1221.

Only a very small number of Heavenly Monarchs can practice Chaos Divine Powers, and even the vast majority of Heavenly Monarchs who have cultivated Chaotic Divine Powers are not among the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers.

The Starlight Exterminator is already very good in the Chaos Divine Power, and its power is not bad.

It was impossible for other Heavenly Monarchs to specialize in cultivating the powerful Star Divine Power for the sake of Xingchen Sha, so Ye Tian's advantage was too great.

Other than that.

He could easily sneak into the Sea of Ten Stars, and with his ability to conceal his aura and whereabouts, it would be difficult for the Demon Sound Sect to discover his whereabouts.

At the beginning, he assassinated the Heavenly Monarch of the Heavenly Fire Sect, and the Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect had no way to find him.

Therefore, he was not worried that he would be discovered by the Demon Yin Sect.

If you can't find it, you will have Starlight Extinction, so the speed of collecting Star Sand is absolutely terrifying.

"I hope I can have a big harvest in the Sea of Ten Stars!"

Ye Tian said.

Sea of Ten Stars.

The Demon Sound Sect was shocked by the ten stars, and arranged an astonishing star array, enveloping the entire Ten Star Sea.

And there are ten palaces on the ten stars, and each palace has a Heavenly Monarch in charge, among which there is even a Heavenly Monarch in the Heavenly Monarch List, plus this amazing star array, even the Heavenly Monarch at the top of the Heavenly Monarch List cannot attack it.

Moreover, the Ten Star Sea is within the territory of the Demon Yin Sect, and the Heavenly Monarch of the Demon Yin Sect can come to support at any time, so the Demon Yin Sect is not afraid of people from other forces attacking the Ten Star Sea.

In addition, it is not easy to collect Star Sand in the Ten Star Sea, and it takes a long time.

Therefore, as long as the Demon Sound Sect is not destroyed, the Ten Star Seas cannot be lost.

However, when the Demon Yin Sect didn't expect it, Ye Tian actually set his sights on the Ten Star Sea.

Ten Star Overseas, Ye Tian's figure appeared, using a hidden chaotic divine power to cover his figure, and using the Variety Illusion Mirror to change his soul aura.

Even if concealing supernatural powers doesn't work, it will be difficult for others to detect his true identity.

"This big array is extraordinary, I'm afraid it's difficult to enter directly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he can shuttle in, it will leave space fluctuations, and the Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect are not stupid, it is impossible not to find out.

"Wait, the people of the Demon Sound Sect will definitely open the big array to enter and exit, and when the big array opens, I will use the space-time transfer technique to move in, even if there will be spatial fluctuations, but it will be mixed with the fluctuations of the big array opening, and it will not be easy to find!"

Ye Tian estimated.

And that's thousands of years.

this day.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect opened the Great Array, allowing the Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs who had collected the Star Sand to come out of the Ten Star Sea.

And at the moment when the big array opened, Ye Tian used the space-time transfer technique to shuttle into the Ten Star Sea.

Meanwhile.

One of the Heavenly Monarchs guarding the Ten Star Sea frowned.

He was the 801st Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and his strength was not weak, and just now, he suddenly sensed that the spatial fluctuations opened by the Star Array seemed to be a little different from usual.

Suddenly, his divine sense probed away, but found nothing.

Immediately, his divine sense combined with the Star Great Array to monitor the area of the Ten Star Sea, but still found nothing.

"It should be a normal change in the Star Array, it's normal for this Great Array to fluctuate a little!"

The Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch guessed.

Immediately, he didn't care, closed his eyes and pondered, and began to comprehend one of his own chaotic supernatural powers.

......

Sea of Ten Stars, the depths.

Ye Tian integrated into the sea water of the Ten Star Sea with the chaotic divine power of the water system, and concealed his breath, not moving at all, to prevent himself from being discovered.

It was a long time before he began to look for Xingchensha.

Xingchen Sand is not easy to find, only those who have cultivated the Xingchen Divine Power will have a faint sense, otherwise they can only be found by the Divine Sense at close range.

But the area of the Ten Star Sea is also very large, and if you just rely on your divine sense to explore every inch of space, how long will it take?

Ye Tian has cultivated the Starlight Exterminator, this is a powerful Divine Power ranked more than 1,000th among the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers, and his sense of Xingchen Sand is naturally far superior to that of others.

Immediately, Ye Tian activated the star induction of the Starlight Extinction Hand, sensing the star sand at the bottom of the Ten Star Sea.

"Being able to sense a million miles is enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

In the million-mile star sensing realm, the position of a grain of star sand was revealed in Ye Tian's induction.

"There are a lot of star sand, at least one or two in a grain of star sand, and some big star sand even weighs half a catty. The Xingchen Sand within a million miles alone is estimated to be tens of thousands of catties!"

Ye Tian judged.

What is the concept of tens of thousands of catties of Xingchen Sand, that is, it is like tens of thousands of points!

With the speed at which Ye Tian collected the Star Sand, it wouldn't take long to collect these Star Sands at all, at most a few months.

Earn tens of thousands of points in a few months, which is not slow.

At the beginning, Tai'a Sun Star was also rich in resources, but too many Heavenly Monarchs competed with him, and countless Heavenly Monarchs collected resources, and in the later stage, there were no resources.

But it's different here, there are few Heavenly Monarchs who can compete with Ye Tian, let alone those god generals, it's very difficult to collect a grain of Star Sand.

"Hahahaha, as long as I don't get discovered, with my ability, I can definitely make a lot of money here!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Before the first Star Sand, Ye Tian used the Starlight Extermination Hand, but he controlled the power and size, otherwise the truly complete version of the Starlight Exterminator Hand could even be easily held and played with by the Ancient Star, and it would not be a problem to even cover half of the Ten Star Sea.

So many starlight exterminators are so dazzling, even a fool can find out his whereabouts!

Rumble!!!!

A starlight extinction hand the size of a normal person, under Ye Tian's control, pinched the star sand, and began to peel out of the water and the void little by little.

Xingchen Sand will turn into star light points when it enters the water, just like the planet is located in the starry sky, connected to the starry sky, and Xingchen Sand is also embedded in the underwater water and void of Shixing Sea Lake, if you want to take it away, you must isolate the void and seawater, and then send it into the water of your own body space, so that you can officially take away Xingchen Sand.

Ye Tian had already prepared something to store the Star Sand, a Chaos Treasure called the Star Pot, which contained a lake containing the power of the stars, which was the most suitable storage thing for storing the Star Sand.

Time passed little by little, and the Xingchen Sand was shaken by Ye Tian, and began to isolate itself from this void, and even began to split with the sea water, as if it had turned into a real grain of sand.

After a long time, the first grain of Xingchen Sand was taken out and put into the Xingchen pot by Ye Tian.

In the following days, Ye Tian took away a grain of Xingchen Sand, and there were more and more Xingchen Sand in the Xingchen Pot.

One hundred pounds!

A thousand pounds!

10,000 catties!

100,000 catties!

200,000 catties!

500,000 catties!

A million catties!

......

With the passage of time, Ye Tian had collected a very large number of Star Seas.

In ten years, Ye Tian has collected at least 2 million catties of Xingchen Sand, which is equivalent to earning 2 million points.

Originally, Ye Tian planned to continue collecting like this, and it was worth collecting enough Xingchen Sand for 10 million points before he was ready to leave.

But on this day, Ye Tian noticed something unusual.

"Another big array!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The area in the central area of the Ten Star Sea was actually isolated by a large array, and this large array was very extraordinary, there was almost no fluctuation, if it wasn't for Ye Tian's strong divine soul and being able to detect a trace of abnormality, otherwise it really couldn't be discovered.

Obviously, the Heavenly Monarch who arranged this great array definitely had unimaginable achievements in the formation path.

"Strange, the Demon Sound Sect has already arranged a star array to envelop the Ten Star Sea, and the Ten Star Sea has completely fallen into the hands of the Demon Sound Sect, why should they pay a huge price to arrange the big array again in the central sea area of the Ten Star Sea?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Could it be that there are amazing treasures in this area?"

Ye Tian thought.

So, Ye Tian began to study this big array.

After a long time, Ye Tian really studied a little clue.

This large array only has the effect of concealment and isolation, containing the power of the space avenue, but it does not have a strong defensive effect, with his current strength, he can break a gap in the large array and enter the internal area.

But in this way, he will undoubtedly be exposed.

If there is an amazing treasure in it, he will undoubtedly earn it.

But if there were no treasures in it, he would no longer be able to collect Star Sand in the Ten Star Sea, it would undoubtedly be a loss.

"No matter, collect the Star Sand first, and after collecting enough Star Sand, then consider whether to enter or not!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Year after year passed.

Ye Tian continued to collect Xingchen Sand in the Ten Star Sea, and had been avoiding other Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals, and his life was extremely tense, for fear that he would be discovered if he didn't put his mind down.

Gradually, Ye Tian collected nearly 10 million catties of Xingchen Sand, and 150 years have passed.

Ten Star Seas was collected by Ye Tian with so much Star Sand, but there were still a lot of Star Sands.

Only then did Ye Tian realize how huge the value of this Ten Star Sea was, far more than 10 million points, it was estimated to be worth hundreds of millions of points, and it was also a treasure land for sustainable development, and the value was estimated to be several times more.

"I underestimate the Ten Star Sea, it is estimated that other forces do not know that the value of the Ten Star Sea is so high, otherwise it is estimated that they will attack the Ten Star Sea at all costs!" Ye Tian suddenly thought.

A few more days passed.

Ye Tian had almost finished collecting the areas of the Ten Star Sea that were rich in Star Sand, and the Star Sand in other areas was relatively sparse, and if he wanted to collect it, it would take more time.

In addition, Ye Tian had already collected enough 10 million catties of Xingchen Sand, so he was not ready to collect any more.

It's not that he doesn't want to continue collecting, but if he collects too much, the Demon Yin Sect will definitely find out, and they are not stupid, the output of the Ten Star Sea Star Chensha has decreased again and again, can you not doubt it?

Even the Demon Yin Sect had already begun to suspect it, Ye Tian had already felt that a stream of divine consciousness was coming every few days, if it weren't for his hidden supernatural powers, otherwise he would have been discovered long ago.

"You have to go, but before you leave, you have to go inside that big array and take a look!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
